description: "Donald Trump" will soon be put to meat Are you happy? In vain This is just a 700-kilogram bull from Bangladesh, which will be sacrificed on the Muslim holiday of Kurban Bayram. And he got such a buzz thanks to his hairstyle, reminiscent of Trump's hairstyle.
description_en: "Donald Trump" will soon be put to meat Are you happy? In vain This is just a 700-kilogram bull from Bangladesh, which will be sacrificed on the Muslim holiday of Kurban Bayram. And he got such a buzz thanks to his hairstyle, reminiscent of Trump's hairstyle.
description_uk: "Дональда Трампа" скоро пустят на мясо Обрадовались? Зря. Это всего лишь 700-килограммовый бычок из Бангладеш, которого на мусульманский праздник Курбан-байрам принесут в жертву. А такую кликуху он получил благодаря своей прическе, напоминающей укладку Трампа.

title: Thank you to the leaders of the communities of Rivne region, Volyn...

description: Thank you to the leaders of the communities of Rivne region, Volyn and Zhytomyr region for taking such care of your people and our state. The main focus of our meeting was on security in the northern direction. We must be strong, so strengthening defenses, erecting fortifications and the readiness of our troops for any scenario is a priority. Support for education and children was discussed separately. A clear task for government officials is...
description_en: Thank you to the leaders of the communities of Rivne region, Volyn and Zhytomyr region for taking such care of your people and our state. The main focus of our meeting was on security in the northern direction. We must be strong, so strengthening defenses, erecting fortifications and the readiness of our troops for any scenario is a priority. Support for education and children was discussed separately. A clear task for government officials is...
description_uk: Дякую керівникам громад Рівненщини, Волині та Житомирщини за те, що так дбаєте про своїх людей і нашу державу. Головна увага нашої зустрічі була присвячена безпеці на північному напрямку. Ми повинні бути сильними, тому посилення оборони, зведення фортифікацій та готовність наших військ до будь-якого сценарію – пріоритет. Окремо обговорили підтримку освіти та дітей. Чітке завдання для урядовців –...

description: France wants to join the joint program of Germany and Britain on the development of long-range missiles, - FT The project envisages the creation of ground-based missiles with a range of more than 2,000 km for striking targets deep in the territory of the Russian Federation. As the Financial Times writes, the idea became especially relevant after Trump canceled plans to deploy American Tomahawks in Germany. European countries fear...
description_en: France wants to join the joint program of Germany and Britain on the development of long-range missiles, - FT The project envisages the creation of ground-based missiles with a range of more than 2,000 km for striking targets deep in the territory of the Russian Federation. As the Financial Times writes, the idea became especially relevant after Trump canceled plans to deploy American Tomahawks in Germany. European countries fear...
description_uk: Франция хочет присоединиться к совместной программе Германии и Британии по разработке дальнобойных ракет, - FT Проект предусматривает создание наземных ракет с дальностью более 2000 км для ударов по целям глубоко на территории рф. Как пишет Financial Times, идея стала особенно актуальной после того, как Трамп отменил планы размещения американских Tomahawk в Германии. Европейские страны опасаются,...

description: I was with our soldiers who are being treated and undergoing rehabilitation after injuries in one of the medical institutions of the Rivne region. I talked to the defenders. They defended Ukraine in various directions - Kharkiv region, Kherson region, Dnipro region, Donetsk region, participated in the Kursk operation. Awarded soldiers with state awards. Thank you for serving and protecting our country. It is very important that the infrastructure for...
description_en: I was with our soldiers who are being treated and undergoing rehabilitation after injuries in one of the medical institutions of the Rivne region. I talked to the defenders. They defended Ukraine in various directions - Kharkiv region, Kherson region, Dnipro region, Donetsk region, participated in the Kursk operation. Awarded soldiers with state awards. Thank you for serving and protecting our country. It is very important that the infrastructure for...
description_uk: Був у наших воїнів, які лікуються та проходять реабілітацію після поранень в одному з медичних закладів Рівненщини. Поспілкувався з захисниками. Вони захищали Україну на різних напрямках – Харківщині, Херсонщині, Дніпровщині, Донеччині, брали участь у Курській операції. Відзначив воїнів державними нагородами. Дякую за службу та захист нашої країни. Дуже важливо, щоб інфраструктура для...
